Quercus globosa Plastome VCF QC And Filtering Report

Generated 2026-07-14 14:41:08 CDT from Quercus_globosa_plastome.allsite.allsite.exclude8_2397024510.filtered.variant.vcf.gz.

Interpretation

The final VCF contains 442 PASS records across 209 samples. Site missingness remains below the configured 10% filter, but sample-level missingness and plastome heterozygote calls deserve additional review before downstream haplotype or network analyses.

SNPfiltR status: SNPfiltR is not installed in this R library, so this report uses vcfR to compute equivalent QC summaries and records the SNPfiltR status for reproducibility.

Filtering Conditions

These conditions are parsed from the final VCF header and the alloutgroup filtering history.

StepConditionExpressionSource
1Exclude eight samplesQuercus_414, Quercus_415, Quercus_419, Quercus_422, Quercus_424, Quercus_427, Quercus_433, Quercus_435VCF header bcftools_viewCommand and file name exclude8
2Keep reference sites or biallelic SNP/indel sitesN_ALT=0 || (N_ALT=1 && (TYPE="snp" || TYPE="indel"))VCF header bcftools_viewCommand
3Remove sites with >=10% missing genotypes before genotype maskingF_MISSING < 0.10VCF header bcftools_viewCommand
4Mask low-quality variant-site genotypes to missingN_ALT>0 & (FMT/DP<10 | FMT/GQ<30 | FMT/DP>10000)VCF header bcftools_pluginCommand setGT
5Mask low-quality reference-site genotypes to missingN_ALT=0 & (FMT/DP<10 | FMT/RGQ<30 | FMT/DP>10000)VCF header bcftools_pluginCommand setGT
6Remove sites with >=10% missing genotypes after genotype maskingF_MISSING < 0.10VCF header bcftools_viewCommand
7Apply GATK-style site hard filters separately to SNPs and indelsSNPs: QD>=2, FS<=60, MQ>=40, MQRankSum>=-12.5, ReadPosRankSum>=-8, SOR<=3; indels: QD>=2, FS<=200, ReadPosRankSum>=-20, SOR<=10VCF header bcftools_filterCommand
8Keep variant SNP/indel sites for this final variant VCFN_ALT>0 && (TYPE="snp" || TYPE="indel")VCF header bcftools_viewCommand

Suggestions

  • The site-level missingness filter is behaving as expected: the maximum remaining site missingness is 9.57%, below the 10% cutoff.
  • 11 samples have more than 10% missing genotypes in this final variant VCF. Inspect these before haplotype or network analysis; if they drive topology, consider a sample-level missingness cutoff or a sensitivity run without them.
  • 117 sites have MAF = 0 after genotype masking. For haplotype/network inputs, remove monomorphic records after masking so only informative variation remains.
  • The highest site heterozygote rate is 98.56%. Because plastome calls are usually treated as haploid or effectively haploid, inspect high-heterozygosity clusters and consider masking heterozygotes to missing before no-missing haplotype analyses.
  • Depth and genotype quality look broadly strong after masking: median DP is 606 and mean GQ is 96.42 across called genotypes. The current DP >= 10, GQ/RGQ >= 30, and DP <= 10000 masks are reasonable for this dataset.
